text.title: ads-google-reporting Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-google-reporting as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Focusing on the wrong metrics: clicks, impressions, or CTR instead of conversions and CPA.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: More clicks at high CPA is worse than fewer clicks at low CPA; track metrics that tie to business outcomes.

failure-mode.description: Not segmenting data. Looking only at campaign-level averages hides high-performing and low-performing subsets.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Segment analysis reveals optimization opportunities missed at the aggregate level.
